title: OpenWay CENTRON Smart-Meter
short description: This is a signal from a OpenWay Centron Electric 'Smart Meter'. Each house is now fitted with one of these, and they are strong - typically 50 dB above the atmospheric noise level.
description: This is a signal from a OpenWay CENTRON Smart-Meter in California. Each house is now fitted with one of these, and they are strong - typically 50 dB above the atmospheric noise level.
